is_statement: T Cloud Hybrid combines private and public cloud with a central governance framework, multi-cloud connectivity platform (MCCP), industry-specific variants, and cross-cloud automation.
does_statement: Integrates OT and IT workloads across on-premises SCADA systems and public cloud without exposing operational technology to internet-facing attack surfaces.
means_statement: Enables 40% faster deployment of grid management applications while maintaining BSI-certified air-gap isolation for critical control systems.

evidence.statement: Hybrid cloud architecture deployed at 3 German transmission system operators in 2024
